data.title: Security Response Automation
data.description: Automated detection and response systems in place to rapidly mitigate threats.
data.technical_spec: SIEM tools, automated threat detection scripts

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: All data transmitted and stored is encrypted to protect user privacy.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit, AES-256 for data at rest

data.title: Access Control
data.description: Strict access protocols for employee and system interaction with sensitive data.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation Strategies
data.description: Infrastructure designed to detect and neutralize denial-of-service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Traffic monitoring, rate limiting, edge security

data.title: Continuous Security Audits
data.description: Regularly scheduled security audits and compliance checks.
